name: Mediterranean Barley & Brown Rice Bake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup mozzarella cheese, part skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse rice and barley under cold water.
2. In a saucepan, bring 2 1/2 cups of water to boil. Add rice and barley; stir. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 40 minutes or until water is absorbed and rice is tender.
3. Spray an 11 x 7 inch baking dish with nonstick vegetable cooking spray. Spread the cooked rice mixture in the bottom of the dish.
4. In a saucepan with about 1/2 cup of boiling water, cook zucchini, onion, and green pepper for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender-crisp. Drain and spread over the rice mixture.
5. In a small bowl, combine 1/3 cup of water, tomato paste, garlic, basil (or oregano), and sugar. Pour over the vegetables.
6. Arrange sliced tomatoes on top. Cover and bake at 325°F for 25 minutes or until heated through.
7. Sprinkle with cheese; bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
